reviews.review_title: Can I get free moderator please
reviews.review_description: I want to get moderator I'm downloading the game I'm going to check it out and if I like it can I get moderator please And also it's my birthday and when I join my name's going to be USA so please give me moderator

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support and happy birthday! Moderator access isn’t free, but you can either purchase it for 15 dollars or apply through the Discord server when applications are open. I appreciate you checking out Chimps Place and hope you enjoy it!
